---
name: Improvement task
about: Improve an existing feature
title: "[IMPROVEMENT] "
labels: improvement
assignees: ""
---

## Area

What part of the project should be improved?

Examples:

- CLI
- Web UI
- Reports
- Client packs
- Tests
- Documentation

## Current Behavior

Describe how it works now.

## Desired Behavior

Describe how it should work after the improvement.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Change is small and focused
- [ ] npm test passes
- [ ] GitHub Actions passes
- [ ] Documentation is updated if needed
